Headline: Closure - Thetford Grammar School, Norfolk
Info: Thetford Grammar School, one of Britain's oldest independent schools, has announced its closure at the end of the current academic year due to severe financial pressures exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on fees, and is now seeking to merge with Finborough School.

Headline: Financial - St Francis' Catholic Primary School (State), North Somerset
Info: Facing significant financial pressures and falling pupil rolls, St Francis' Catholic Primary School has been forced to merge year groups to save on staffing costs, highlighting the broader demographic shifts impacting state school capacities.

Headline: Closure - Thetford Grammar School, Norfolk
Info: Thetford Grammar School, an independent school with a 1,400-year history, has announced its permanent closure at the end of the current term due to severe financial pressures exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on school fees [2.3]. The school plans to merge its resources with Finborough School in Stowmarket.

Headline: Closure - Malvern St James, Worcestershire
Info: Malvern St James has proposed closing at the end of the current academic year due to a £6 million shortfall caused by falling pupil numbers, the introduction of VAT on school fees, and rising employment costs.

Headline: Acquisition - Immanuel College, Hertfordshire
Info: Immanuel College has been saved from closure after securing a £12.7 million rescue deal and being acquired by the international education network Global University Systems, following severe financial pressures exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Closure - Malvern St James School, Worcestershire
Info: Malvern St James School has announced its likely closure at the end of the current academic year, citing the introduction of VAT on private school fees and increasing employment costs as key factors.
